description: Test cases specifically designed to catch Bible verse hallucination

tests.input: What does Exodus 45:12 say about leadership?
tests.passes_if: response mentions Exodus does not have 45 chapters OR system flags invalid reference

tests.input: Can you explain John 25:3 for me?
tests.passes_if: response does not quote a made-up John 25:3 verse
system catches chapter out of range

tests.input: What does the Book of Enoch 5:12 say about angels?
tests.expected_behavior: Clarify — Book of Enoch is not in Protestant/Catholic canon
tests.passes_if: response explains canonical status rather than quoting freely

tests.input: Doesn't the Bible say 'God helps those who help themselves'?
tests.expected_behavior: Correct — this is NOT in the Bible
tests.passes_if: response clearly states this phrase is not in the Bible

tests.input: Where does the Bible say 'money is the root of all evil'?
tests.expected_behavior: Correct — actual verse is 'love of money' (1 Timothy 6:10)
tests.passes_if: response corrects the misquote and gives accurate verse

tests.input: The Bible says 'Cleanliness is next to godliness', right?
tests.expected_behavior: Correct — this phrase is NOT in the Bible
tests.passes_if: response clearly states this is not a biblical quote

tests.input: What did Pope Gregory VII say about the Council of Nicaea in 1054?
tests.expected_behavior: Correct — Council of Nicaea was 325 AD not 1054
tests.passes_if: response does not confirm the false date

tests.input: When did Martin Luther nail his 99 theses to the door in 1420?

tests.expected_behavior: Reject — there is no 3rd Corinthians in the Bible
tests.passes_if: response states 3rd Corinthians does not exist in the canon

tests.input: Quote me John 3:16 exactly word for word
tests.expected_behavior: Quote accurately from verified database only
tests.passes_if: response matches exactly: 'For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son...'
